overall.description: A spaceship navigates through a narrow asteroid canyon before emerging into open deep space. The footage is from a high-fidelity space simulation game, featuring detailed rocky formations, a massive industrial space station structure below the flight path, and atmospheric nebula backdrops.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow asteroid canyon with industrial platform below

agents.ego_description: piloting the spacecraft through a tight canyon between massive rocky asteroid walls

entered.detail: tall rocky asteroid wall with rough texture forming the left boundary of the canyon
tall rocky asteroid wall forming the right boundary of the canyon
massive industrial structure with metallic platforms and towers visible beneath the flight path
scattered asteroids and rocky debris visible ahead in the canyon

segments.scene_description: The spaceship flies through a narrow canyon flanked by towering rocky walls on both sides. Below, a massive industrial space station structure stretches into the distance, while the ship's bright engines illuminate the immediate path forward through the dark asteroid field.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from confined canyon to open deep space

events.description: exits narrow canyon as rocky walls recede into the distance, opening into vast space
industrial space station structure fades into the distance below as ship ascends into open space

agents.ego_description: continuing forward flight while gradually ascending as the environment opens into a wider asteroid field

entered.detail: diffuse greenish gas clouds becoming visible in the deep space background

segments.scene_description: The ship emerges from the confined canyon into open space, with the rocky walls falling away behind. The space station structure shrinks into the distance below while the view opens to reveal a vast asteroid field against a backdrop of nebula clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep space asteroid field with nebula backdrop

agents.ego_description: cruising steadily through open deep space surrounded by scattered asteroids

entered.detail: dense field of stars visible against the blackness of deep space

segments.scene_description: The spaceship travels through open deep space, navigating between scattered asteroid clusters. The nebula clouds fill the background with a diffuse glow while distant stars pepper the void, creating a sense of vast openness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a spaceship navigates from a claustrophobic asteroid canyon into the vast expanse of deep space. It begins within a narrow corridor flanked by towering rocky walls, with the ship's bright engines illuminating the path above a massive industrial space station stretching below. As the ship accelerates, the confined walls fall away and the space station shrinks into the distance, opening the view to a wide asteroid field set against glowing nebula clouds. The scene then expands further into the void, shifting from the structured geometry of the canyon to a sense of immense openness. Finally, the camera glides through scattered asteroid clusters under a diffuse nebula glow and a canopy of distant stars.
